description: Missing Eloquent relationships, service bindings, and lifecycle linkages found during the FSM graph verification pass.

repaired_this_pass.reason: VehicleAssignment is polymorphic (assignable morph) covering ServiceJob|DispatchRoute|Shift, but ServiceJob had no inverse MorphMany. This meant VehicleAssignment records could not be queried from the ServiceJob side via ORM.
repaired_this_pass.fix: Added vehicleAssignments(): MorphMany to ServiceJob and VehicleAssignment use import.

repaired_this_pass.reason: VehicleStock.reserved_for_job_id FK existed and VehicleStock.reservedForJob() BelongsTo was declared, but ServiceJob had no inverse HasMany. Vehicle stock items reserved for a job were retrieved via raw queries in helper methods.
originating_quote_id FK exists on service_agreements and is referenced in computed method originatingSale(), but no Eloquent BelongsTo relationship was declared.
renewal_quote_id FK exists on service_agreements and is referenced in commercialCoverageSource() computed method, but no Eloquent BelongsTo relationship was declared.
origin_quote_id FK exists on service_plans and is used in originatingSale() computed method, but no Eloquent BelongsTo was declared.
sale_agreement_id FK exists on service_plans for sale-recurring plans, used in originatingSaleAgreement() computed method, but no Eloquent BelongsTo was declared.
sale_agreement_id FK exists on service_plan_visits and is referenced in saleAgreementSource() computed method, but no Eloquent BelongsTo was declared.
assigned_to FK exists on service_plan_visits but no Eloquent BelongsTo was declared. User assignment at the visit level was not queryable via ORM.
service_agreements.premises_id FK is properly migrated. ServiceAgreement.premises() BelongsTo is declared. But Premises had no inverse HasMany, breaking the Premises→ServiceAgreement navigation.
dispatch_routes.vehicle_id FK is properly migrated and DispatchRoute.vehicle() BelongsTo is declared, but Vehicle had no inverse HasMany. Vehicle-to-route navigation was impossible via ORM.

TechnicianAvailability records are keyed by user_id. DispatchRoute has assigned_user_id. No Eloquent relationship connected route to technician availability, making ORM-based availability-vs-route queries impossible.
repaired_this_pass.fix: Added technicianAvailabilities(): HasMany via assigned_user_id to DispatchRoute.

repaired_this_pass.reason: Only RepairTemplateService existed in app/Services/Repair/. There was no service to create, schedule, advance status, consume parts, complete, or cancel a RepairOrder. The repair lifecycle had no orchestrating service.
repaired_this_pass.fix: Created app/Services/Repair/RepairOrderService.php with create(), createFromServiceJob(), schedule(), reserveParts(), consumeParts(), complete(), close(), cancel() methods.

deferred_linkages.reason: No FK or bridge table exists between repair_orders and vehicle_stock. Parts consumed during repairs reference vehicle stock at the RepairPartUsage level, not directly on RepairOrder.
deferred_linkages.recommendation: Add repair_part_usages.vehicle_stock_id FK in a future schema pass to link parts consumption to vehicle stock at the usage line level.

deferred_linkages.reason: AgreementSchedulerService exists for agreement-scoped scheduling. No general-purpose ServiceJobSchedulingService exists for direct slot allocation, conflict detection, and calendar integration.

TechnicianAvailability and AvailabilityWindow models exist, and DispatchConstraintService references availability. But no dedicated service encapsulates availability window queries, conflict detection, or capacity checks.
deferred_linkages.recommendation: Create in dispatch intelligence scoring pass.

deferred_linkages.reason: VehicleAssignment.assignable morph covers Shift but Shift model has no vehicleAssignment() inverse relationship.
deferred_linkages.recommendation: Add morphMany to Shift model in vehicle/shift integration pass.
